extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked with over 2km to go on the uphill finish in Landerneau, soloing to victory after Deceuninck led out in final 30km
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck-QuickStep controlled final 30km despite having sprinter Bennett, prioritizing GC jersey over stage win protection
ALAPHILIPPE attacked beyond 2km on uphill finish, exploiting that GC favorites waited too long to respond
SCHELLING Ide went solo at 85km for KOM jersey while peloton ignored him, revealing teams underestimated breakaway timing

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: attacked with unusual distance remaining (2km+) on punchy finish and held power advantage over GC contenders
rider_signals.DEVENYNS Dries: positive: strong leadout work suggests Deceuninck had multiple GC jersey strategies prepared beyond Bennett sprint
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: neutral: chased ALAPHILIPPE for Total Direct Energie but lacked acceleration to close on steep gradient
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: caught in second crash inside final kilometers, suggests positioning struggles after long absence
rider_signals.SUTTON Yates: negative: abandoned after first major crash, indicating immediate Tour elimination risk from early peloton chaos
